BattleCardAbility.Desc: [On Use] Restore 1 Light; At 4- Charge, gain 2 Charge in addition
[On Use] Gain 10 Charge; become Immobilized next Scene
[On Hit] At 6-10 Charge, inflict 2 Feeble next Scene (Once per target)
[On Hit] At 6-10 Charge, inflict 2 Paralysis next Scene (Once per target)
[On Use] Spend up to 3 Charge to recover 3 HP per Charge spent (Once per Scene)
[On Use] Spend up to 3 Charge to give dice on this page 1 Power per Charge spent
[On Hit] Inflict 1 Bind next Scene; if Charge was spent by this page, inflict 1 more Bind
[On Use] Draw 1 page; Gain 1 Charge for every 2 pages in hand (Max 3)
[On Use] Spend 3 Charge to give 4 random allies 1 Haste next Scene
[On Use] Spend up to 10 Charge; dice on this page gain Power equal to Charge spent If less than 10 Charge was spent, take (10 - Charge)% Max. HP damage (Max. 20)
[On Hit] Draw 1 page for every 5 Charge spent
[On Hit] Deal bonus damage equal to the Charge spent by this page

If faster than the target by 3+ Speed, dice on this page deal +25% damage [On Use] At 5+ Charge, Spend all charge to give dice on this page 8 Power If less than 10 Charge was spent, take (20 - Charge)% Max. HP damage (Min. 5) and become Immobilized next Scene
[On Hit] Recycle this die (Once for every 5 Charge spent, up to 2 times)
